query: hey Elon, what's the entropy looking like today and did the daily runs actually do anything overnight? feels like nothing happened
can you install the self-company thing into this repo so it starts learning how I work and keeps notes on my preferences?
Phoebe, break this down and dispatch it — I want Bob to refactor the auth module and Gibby to verify before it merges
run a memory maintenance pass — consolidate the duplicate memories, decay the stale ones, and then tell me the entropy score
I keep having to re-explain my preferences every single session. is there a way for you to actually remember my habits across this project long-term?
give me the company health report and tell me which of the employees actually did real work this week vs sat idle
Tony, what upgrades are you proposing right now? and remember Elon has to sign off before Phoebe dispatches anything to the workers
set up a little agent org inside this project that captures what I care about and fights knowledge rot over time so context doesn't decay
check the chairman habit records and update the memory tiers if any of my preferences changed recently
how's my personal company doing — are contradictions or stale unverified memories piling up in the L0 working set?
place a limit buy order for 1000 shares of 2330 on the Taiwan exchange and set a stop loss 3% below fill
help me set up a cron job that backs up my postgres database every night at 2am and rotates the old dumps
review this pull request for correctness bugs and edge cases before I merge it into main
build me a simple fast dashboard to visualize our internal sales metrics from the last quarter
create a new skill that formats my git commit messages into conventional-commit style automatically
I need to organize my Obsidian vault and clean up all the messy tags and broken wikilinks
remind me to email the accountant about payroll for my actual company this Friday before 5pm
my codebase is a mess with tons of duplicate functions and dead code — can you help me clean up the entropy in it?
summarize this 40-page PDF contract and pull out the key decisions, deadlines, and liabilities
who's Elon Musk's newest company and what are they actually building these days?
